Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document based on all the information I've gathered:

## Comprehensive T3 Code Monorepo Structure & Architecture

I've completed a thorough exploration of the T3 Code monorepo. Here's a detailed breakdown of its organization, patterns, and technologies:

---

### 1. TOP-LEVEL STRUCTURE

**Root Configuration Files:**
- `/turbo.json` - Turbo repo configuration with task definitions and global environment variables
- `/package.json` - Monorepo workspace with Bun package manager (v1.3.9+), Node v24.13.1+
- `/tsconfig.base.json` - Base TypeScript configuration (ES2023, ESNext modules, bundler resolution)
- Workspaces include: `apps/*`, `packages/*`, `scripts`

**Key Global Environment Variables** (from turbo.json):
- `PORT`, `VITE_WS_URL`, `VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL`, `ELECTRON_RENDERER_PORT`
- `T3CODE_LOG_WS_EVENTS`, `T3CODE_MODE`, `T3CODE_PORT`, `T3CODE_NO_BROWSER`, `T3CODE_STATE_DIR`, `T3CODE_AUTH_TOKEN`, `T3CODE_DESKTOP_WS_URL`

**Turbo Tasks:**
- `dev` - depends on `@t3tools/contracts#build`, persistent, no cache
- `build` - outputs to `dist/**`, `dist-electron/**`
- `typecheck` - no cache, no outputs
- `test` - depends on `^build`, no cache

---

### 2. PACKAGES STRUCTURE

#### **`packages/contracts/`** (Type/Schema Definitions)
**Path:** `/packages/contracts/`
**Package:** `@t3tools/contracts`

**Key Files:**
- `/src/index.ts` - Main export barrel (re-exports all submodules)
- `/src/baseSchemas.ts` - Effect Schema definitions for branded types and enums
- `/src/model.ts` - Model slugs, reasoning efforts, service tier options
- `/src/orchestration.ts` - Orchestration session/thread types
- `/src/provider.ts` - Provider configuration contracts
- `/src/terminal.ts` - Terminal session contracts
- `/src/server.ts` - Server API contracts
- `/src/ws.ts` - WebSocket message contracts
- `/src/editor.ts` - Editor configuration
- `/src/git.ts` - Git-related contracts
- `/src/keybindings.ts` - Keybinding configuration
- `/src/project.ts` - Project contracts
- `/src/ipc.ts` - IPC communication contracts
- `/src/providerRuntime.ts` - Provider runtime contracts

**Export Pattern:**
```
exports: {
  ".": {
    types: "./src/index.ts",
    import: "./src/index.ts",
    require: "./dist/index.cjs"
  }
}
```

**Build Process:** Uses `tsdown` to build ESM + CJS + DTS

**Core Type Definitions (baseSchemas.ts):**
```typescript
- TrimmedString, TrimmedNonEmptyString
- NonNegativeInt, PositiveInt
- IsoDateTime
- Branded types: ThreadId, ProjectId, CommandId, EventId, MessageId, TurnId
- ProviderItemId, RuntimeSessionId, RuntimeTaskId, ApprovalRequestId, CheckpointRef
```

#### **`packages/shared/`** (Shared Utilities)
**Path:** `/packages/shared/`
**Package:** `@t3tools/shared`

**Exports (subpath exports in package.json):**
- `./model` - Model utilities (exported from `src/model.ts`)
- `./git` - Git utilities (exported from `src/git.ts`)
- `./logging` - Logging utilities (exported from `src/logging.ts`)
- `./shell` - Shell execution utilities (exported from `src/shell.ts`)
- `./Net` - Network utilities (exported from `src/Net.ts`)

**Files:**
- `/src/model.ts` - Model slug normalization, resolution, validation functions
- `/src/git.ts` - Git command utilities
- `/src/shell.ts` - Shell command execution
- `/src/Net.ts` - Network utilities
- `/src/logging.ts` - Logging infrastructure

**Dependencies:** `@t3tools/contracts`, `effect` (Effect-TS)

---

### 3. APPS/WEB APPLICATION

**Path:** `/apps/web/`
**Package:** `@t3tools/web`

#### **Project Structure:**
```
src/
├── main.tsx                          # Vite entry point
├── router.ts                         # TanStack Router setup
├── routeTree.gen.ts                  # Auto-generated route tree
├── store.ts                          # Zustand global state
├── types.ts                          # App-level TypeScript types
├── appSettings.ts                    # App settings with Effect Schema
├── env.ts                            # Electron vs browser detection
├── index.css                         # Tailwind + CSS variables
├── hooks/
│   ├── useTheme.ts                  # Dark/light/system theme hook (useSyncExternalStore)
│   ├── useMediaQuery.ts             # Media query hook
│   └── useTurnDiffSummaries.ts
├── routes/                          # TanStack Router file-based routes
│   ├── __root.tsx                  # Root route with providers
│   ├── _chat.tsx                   # Chat layout route
│   ├── _chat.$threadId.tsx         # Thread detail route
│   ├── _chat.index.tsx
│   └── _chat.settings.tsx
├── components/
│   ├── Sidebar.tsx                 # Main sidebar with thread list
│   ├── ChatView.tsx                # Main chat/composer view (213KB - large)
│   ├── ChatView.browser.tsx        # Browser-specific variant
│   ├── ComposerPromptEditor.tsx    # Message composer
│   ├── ChatMarkdown.tsx            # Markdown renderer
│   ├── DiffPanel.tsx               # Code diff viewer
│   ├── DiffWorkerPoolProvider.tsx  # Worker pool for diff rendering
│   ├── GitActionsControl.tsx       # Git operations UI
│   ├── BranchToolbar.tsx           # Git branch selection
│   ├── ProjectScriptsControl.tsx   # Project script execution
│   ├── ThreadTerminalDrawer.tsx    # Terminal output drawer
│   ├── PlanSidebar.tsx             # Proposed plan sidebar
│   ├── Icons.tsx                   # Icon collection
│   └── ui/                         # ~40 shadcn/ui base components
│       ├── button.tsx              # Base UI button (CVA + @base-ui/react)
│       ├── sidebar.tsx             # Sidebar provider + components
│       ├── toast.tsx               # Toast notifications
│       ├── dialog.tsx              # Modal dialogs
│       ├── sheet.tsx               # Sheet/drawer component
│       ├── combobox.tsx            # Combobox with context
│       └── [20+ more components]   # badge, alert, switch, checkbox, etc.
├── lib/                            # React Query + utilities
│   ├── gitReactQuery.ts           # Git queries & mutations
│   ├── projectReactQuery.ts       # Project queries
│   ├── providerReactQuery.ts      # Provider queries
│   ├── serverReactQuery.ts        # Server queries
│   ├── diffRendering.ts           # Diff theme resolution
│   ├── turnDiffTree.ts            # Diff tree structure
│   ├── utils.ts                   # General utilities
│   ├── lruCache.ts                # LRU cache implementation
│   └── [more utilities]
└── [Various store/logic files]
    ├── store.ts                    # Zustand state
    ├── composerDraftStore.ts       # Draft composer state
    ├── terminalStateStore.ts       # Terminal state
    ├── session-logic.ts            # Session derivations
    ├── composer-logic.ts           # Composer parsing logic
    ├── wsTransport.ts              # WebSocket transport
    ├── nativeApi.ts                # Native API bridge
    └── [more logic files]
```

#### **Root Route Provider Setup** (`routes/__root.tsx`):
```typescript
- Root route with QueryClient context
- ErrorComponentProps with error display UI
- Conditional rendering: shows "Connecting..." before nativeApi is ready
- Provider chain: ToastProvider → AnchoredToastProvider → EventRouter → DesktopProjectBootstrap → Outlet
```

#### **Router Setup** (`router.ts`):
```typescript
- Uses TanStack Router with file-based routes
- QueryClient passed to router context
- StoreProvider wrapping setup (via Wrap parameter)
- Providers: QueryClientProvider → StoreProvider → children
```

#### **Styling & Theme System:**
- **Framework:** Tailwind CSS v4 with Vite plugin
- **CSS Variables** in root `:root` (light mode) and `@variant dark` selector:
  - Color system: `--color-primary`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, etc.
  - Semantic colors: `--info`, `--success`, `--warning`, `--destructive` with foreground variants
  - Radius scale: `--radius-sm` through `--radius-4xl`
- **Theme Hook** (`hooks/useTheme.ts`):
  - Uses `useSyncExternalStore` for external store subscription
  - Supports "light" | "dark" | "system" theme preferences
  - Persists to `localStorage` (key: `t3code:theme`)
  - System preference detection via `window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)")`
  - Applies theme via `document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark", isDark)`
  - Suppresses transitions on theme change
- **CSS Custom Properties:**
  - Imported from Tailwind theme
  - Uses Tailwind's `@custom-variant` for dark mode
  - No-transitions class to prevent flashing during theme switch

#### **UI Component Patterns:**

All UI components use **Base UI + CVA (Class Variance Authority)** pattern:

**Button Component Example** (`components/ui/button.tsx`):
```typescript
- Uses @base-ui/react (mergeProps, useRender)
- CVA variants: size (default, sm, lg, xl, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg, icon-xl, icon-xs)
- CVA variants: variant (default, destructive, outline, ghost, link, secondary)
- mergeProps combines default props with user props
- useRender allows polymorphic rendering
- cn() utility for merging classnames
- Extensive Tailwind classes with responsive modifiers
```

**Context Pattern** (UI components like sidebar, combobox, toggle-group):
```typescript
- React.createContext<ContextType>()
- Provider component with React.useContext
- Memoized context values
- Exported for use in compound components
```

#### **Global State Management:**

**Store** (`store.ts`) - **Zustand-based**:
```typescript
- Uses Zustand create<AppStore>()
- Persisted to localStorage (key: `t3code:renderer-state:v8`)
- Legacy key cleanup for migration
- AppState shape:
  - projects: Project[]
  - threads: Thread[]
  - threadsHydrated: boolean
  
- Actions:
  - setProjectExpanded, setError, setThreadBranch, etc.
  - sync methods for bulk state updates
  - persistState() called on every change via subscribe()
  
- StoreProvider: Simple Fragment wrapper that hydrates from localStorage on mount
```

**Composer Draft Store** (`composerDraftStore.ts`):
```typescript
- Manages draft state for in-progress messages
- Keyed by threadId
```

**Terminal State Store** (`terminalStateStore.ts`):
```typescript
- Manages terminal state across threads
- Supports multiple terminals per thread
```

**App Settings** (`appSettings.ts`) - **Effect Schema-based**:
```typescript
AppSettingsSchema: {
  codexBinaryPath: string (max 4096)
  codexHomePath: string (max 4096)
  confirmThreadDelete: boolean
  enableAssistantStreaming: boolean
  codexServiceTier: "auto" | "fast" | "flex"
  customCodexModels: string[]
}

Persisted to: localStorage (key: `t3code:app-settings:v1`)
Custom model validation with MAX_CUSTOM_MODEL_COUNT = 32
```

#### **React Query Integration** (`lib/`):
```typescript
- Server query: serverReactQuery.ts (serverConfigQueryOptions, serverQueryKeys)
- Git mutations: gitReactQuery.ts (gitStatusQueryOptions, gitRemoveWorktreeMutationOptions, etc.)
- Project queries: projectReactQuery.ts
- Provider queries: providerReactQuery.ts
- All queries registered in lib/ for centralized management
- Uses useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient from @tanstack/react-query
```

#### **Route Tree & Navigation:**
- TanStack Router v1.160+ (file-based routing)
- Auto-generated routeTree.gen.ts from file structure
- Search validation for routes (e.g., diff route search)
- Lazy loading of components (e.g., DiffPanel with Suspense)
- Hash history for Electron, browser history for web

#### **TypeScript Conventions:**
- Path alias: `~/*` → `./src/*`
- Effect language service plugin configured
- Strict mode: `strict: true`
- Path paths configured in tsconfig.json
- React JSX transform: `"jsx": "react-jsx"`

#### **Dependencies (key):**
```json
Runtime:
- react@19.0.0, react-dom@19.0.0
- @tanstack/react-router@1.160.2
- @tanstack/react-query@5.90.0
- @tanstack/react-virtual@3.13.18
- zustand@5.0.11
- @base-ui/react@1.2.0
- lucide-react@0.564.0
- tailwindcss@4.0.0
- lexical@0.41.0, @lexical/react@0.41.0
- @xterm/xterm@6.0.0

Dev:
- vite@8.0.0-beta.12
- @vitejs/plugin-react@5.1.4
- @tailwindcss/vite@4.0.0
- @tanstack/router-plugin@1.161.0
- babel-plugin-react-compiler@19.0.0-beta
- msw@2.12.10 (Mock Service Worker)
- playwright@1.58.2
```

---

### 4. TYPE DEFINITIONS & CONTRACTS

**Key Type Exports** from `@t3tools/contracts`:

**Model Types** (`model.ts`):
```typescript
CodexReasoningEffort = "xhigh" | "high" | "medium" | "low"
ModelSlug = "gpt-5.4" | "gpt-5.3-codex" | "gpt-5.3-codex-spark" | "gpt-5.2-codex" | "gpt-5.2" | (string & {})
ProviderKind = "codex"
ProviderServiceTier = "fast" | "flex" | null
```

**Orchestration Types** (from contracts):
```typescript
OrchestrationReadModel
OrchestrationSessionStatus: "starting" | "running" | "error" | "ready" | "interrupted" | "idle" | "stopped"
OrchestrationLatestTurn
OrchestrationThreadActivity
OrchestrationProposedPlanId
ThreadId, TurnId, MessageId, ProjectId, CheckpointRef (branded strings)
```

**App-Level Types** (`types.ts`):
```typescript
SessionPhase = "disconnected" | "connecting" | "ready" | "running"
RuntimeMode = "full-access" (from contracts)
ProviderInteractionMode = "default" (from contracts)

Project {
  id: ProjectId
  name: string
  cwd: string
  model: string
  expanded: boolean
  scripts: ProjectScript[]
}

Thread {
  id: ThreadId
  codexThreadId: string | null
  projectId: ProjectId
  title: string
  model: string
  runtimeMode: RuntimeMode
  interactionMode: ProviderInteractionMode
  session: ThreadSession | null
  messages: ChatMessage[]
  proposedPlans: ProposedPlan[]
  error: string | null
  createdAt: string
  latestTurn: OrchestrationLatestTurn | null
  branch: string | null
  worktreePath: string | null
  turnDiffSummaries: TurnDiffSummary[]
  activities: OrchestrationThreadActivity[]
}

ChatMessage {
  id: MessageId
  role: "user" | "assistant" | "system"
  text: string
  attachments?: ChatAttachment[]
  createdAt: string
  completedAt?: string
  streaming: boolean
}
```

---

### 5. KEY ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS

#### **Provider Pattern:**
1. **Root Route** wraps app with:
   - `ToastProvider` (toast notifications)
   - `AnchoredToastProvider` (anchored toast positioning)
   - `EventRouter` (server event listener)
   - `DesktopProjectBootstrap` (Electron-specific setup)

2. **Router Setup** provides:
   - `QueryClientProvider` (React Query)
   - `StoreProvider` (Zustand with localStorage persistence)

3. **Route-Level Providers**:
   - Chat layout uses `SidebarProvider` for sidebar state
   - `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` for worker pool management

#### **State Management:**
- **Global State:** Zustand (store.ts) - projects, threads, hydration state
- **React Query:** Centralized server state management
- **Local State:** useState for UI-level state
- **External Store:** useTheme via useSyncExternalStore
- **App Settings:** Effect Schema-validated localStorage

#### **Data Flow:**
1. Server read model synced to Zustand store (syncServerReadModel function)
2. React Query handles server queries & mutations
3. Store selectors used in components (store.threads, store.projects)
4. App settings read/write via Effect Schema with validation

#### **Effect-TS Integration:**
- Contracts use Effect Schema for validation
- App Settings use Schema for strict typing
- Shared utilities exported as source files (no build step by default)
- Effect language service configured in tsconfig for better DX

---

### 6. EXPORT PATTERNS & IMPORT CONVENTIONS

**Package Exports:**

`@t3tools/contracts` - Single default export barrel (index.ts):
```typescript
export * from "./baseSchemas"    // Branded types
export * from "./model"          // Model definitions
export * from "./orchestration"  // Orchestration types
// ... etc
```

`@t3tools/shared` - Subpath exports:
```typescript
"./model" → src/model.ts
"./git" → src/git.ts
"./logging" → src/logging.ts
"./shell" → src/shell.ts
"./Net" → src/Net.ts
```

**Web App Imports:**
- `import from "@t3tools/contracts"` - Direct import from contracts
- `import from "@t3tools/shared/model"` - Subpath imports from shared
- `import from "~/lib/utils"` - Path alias for src-relative imports
- `import from "../hooks/useTheme"` - Relative imports within src

---

### 7. BUILD & DEV SETUP

**Vite Config** (`apps/web/vite.config.ts`):
```typescript
Plugins:
- @tanstack/router-plugin (file-based routes)

content.text:
Everything looks clean. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

---

## Custom Theme System — Implementation Summary

### 1. Theme Definitions (`packages/shared/src/themes.ts`)
- **`Theme` interface** with `id`, `name`, `colors` (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, statusBar), `fontFamily`, and `fontSize`
- **`ThemeColors` interface** for the 7 semantic color slots
- **3 built-in themes**:
  - **T3 Dark** (`t3-dark`) — deep near-black with purple accent (default)
  - **T3 Light** (`t3-light`) — clean white with indigo accent
  - **T3 Midnight** (`t3-midnight`) — deep navy-blue with soft indigo accent
- **`getTheme(id)`** — returns a theme by id, falls back to `t3-dark`
- **`listThemes()`** — returns all available built-in themes
- Exported via new `./themes` subpath export in `packages/shared/package.json`

### 2. Theme Hook (`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`)
- **Backward-compatible** — the existing `theme` / `setTheme` / `resolvedTheme` API for light/dark/system color scheme is fully preserved
- **New additions** to the hook return:
  - `currentTheme` — the active `Theme` object
  - `availableThemes` — all themes from `listThemes()`
  - `setCustomTheme(id)` — switch theme, persists to `localStorage` (`t3code:custom-theme`)
- **CSS custom properties** (`--theme-background`, `--theme-foreground`, `--theme-accent`, `--theme-sidebar`, `--theme-editor`, `--theme-terminal`, `--theme-status-bar`, `--theme-font-family`, `--theme-font-size`) are applied to `:root` on theme change
- Theme is applied on module load (flash prevention) and synced cross-tab via `StorageEvent`

### 3. ThemeSelector Component (`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`)
- Each theme rendered as a selectable card with a **mini swatch** showing the colour palette (sidebar, editor background, foreground bar, accent dot)
- Uses the same UI patterns as the existing appearance radio group (border highlight, "Active" badge)
- Accessible: `role="radiogroup"` and `role="radio"` with `aria-checked`

### 4. Settings Page Wiring (`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`)
- Added a new **"Custom Theme"** section between Appearance and Codex App Server sections
- Imports and renders `<ThemeSelector />`

### Verification
- `bun typecheck` passes for `@t3tools/contracts`, `@t3tools/shared`, and `@t3tools/web` (all 3 successful)
- `bun lint` passes with 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in server code, unrelated)
